markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content production strategy and review the calibration draft.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Topic Selection:** For the sprint, Navan will approve 3–5 topics per cluster, mixing commercial (e.g., listicles) and informational keywords to get diverse feedback on product messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [**Calibration Draft:** The "How to Create a Travel Policy" draft replaces an outdated 2023 post. It improves structure, integrates Navan product mentions, and adds SEO-focused sections (FAQ, TLDR).](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [**Content Generation:** GrowthX's Atlas platform uses an "agentic" pipeline for human-led AI writing, with agents for research (Tably), drafting, and self-correction against writing guidelines and facts.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [**Content Refresh:** GrowthX is analyzing paid keywords and underperforming content for future refreshes. A URL structure change caused false traffic drops, requiring a data fix.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Strategy

  - [**Sprint Goal:** Get diverse feedback on content quality and product messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [**Selection Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [Approve 3–5 topics from each of the 8 clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [Mix commercial keywords (e.g., listicles) with informational ones.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [**Rationale →** Commercial topics provide more opportunities for Navan product mentions, yielding crucial feedback on messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
      - [Navan to approve initial topics by EOD Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [GrowthX starts writing Tuesday/Wednesday for internal editing.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
      - [Drafts delivered to Navan by end of week.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)

### Calibration Draft Review

  - [**Draft:** "How to Create a Travel Policy"](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [**Purpose:** Replace an outdated 2023 post.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [**Key Improvements:**](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [**Structure:** Better organization of H2s/H3s for clarity.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [**Integration:** Product mentions peppered throughout, not just at the end.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [**SEO:** Added FAQ section (targets "People Also Ask") and TLDR (improves AI search visibility).](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**Feedback Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [**Actionable Feedback:** Specific edits (flow, grammar) can be accepted directly.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [**Strategic Feedback:** High-level comments on tone, style, and product messaging are critical for refining the Atlas platform's artifacts (e.g., writing guidelines, product context).](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

### GrowthX's Content Generation Process (Atlas)

  - [Aida demoed the "agentic article generation" pipeline in Atlas, GrowthX's in-house platform.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [**Human-Led Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
    1.  [**Briefing:** Manual input of keyword, word count, and structural templates (e.g., "how-to," "comparison").](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
    2.  [**Research (Tably):** An agent generates a research plan, asks questions, and evaluates source quality.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
    3.  [**Drafting:** An agent creates the draft.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
    4.  **Self-Correction:**
          - [**Validate Writing Guidelines:** An agent grades the draft against rules (0-1 score, e.g., 0.92) and auto-corrects issues like choppy flow.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
          - [**Fact Check:** An agent verifies claims paragraph-by-paragraph.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [**Integration:** Atlas connects to the SEMrush API to find related keywords, ensuring comprehensive topic coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### Content Refresh Analysis

  - [GrowthX is analyzing existing content for refresh opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
  - [**Sources of Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
      - [**Paid Keywords:** Analyzing Nima's list for blog potential.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
      - [**Underperforming Content:** Identifying posts on pages 2–4 that could be pushed to page 1 with a refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [**Data Anomaly:** A significant traffic drop on the "What is a virtual card?" post was caused by a URL structure change (category removed from URL), not poor performance.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
      - [**Fix →** GrowthX will combine data using the slug to get an accurate view.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [**Prioritization:** The sprint focuses on new content. Refreshes will be balanced with new content in Phase 2, excluding time-sensitive news posts.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Libby & Rich:** Approve 3–5 topics per cluster by EOD Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [**Libby & Moran:** Review the calibration draft and notify Aida when complete.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
      - [Import paid keywords and underperforming content data into Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
      - [Fix the traffic analysis by combining data using the URL slug.](https://fathom.video/share/CexRnuCaMz9ytwFW54zxCeheyPmxrBSt?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
